turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh, hi. I have an appointment at 9 AM day after tomorrow and I was wondering if I can push it by an hour or so. 9 is just too early for me.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! Let me check. Your name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Tendulkar, I see your appointment with Dr. Sanjay Deshpande. He has 10 AM and 11 AM available that same day. Which would you prefer?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: 10:30 is ideal but... I'll take 11, that's fine.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Moved to 11 AM. You'll get an SMS with the updated time. Anything else?
